name: reduction_fusion_with_scope_markers_base
description: Control arm for reduction_fusion_with_scope_markers. The fuse_reduction tip (5a5637c93) with no patch applied — reduction fusion is present but the alias-scope/noalias metadata commit is not. The numba vectorize codegen here emits no alias-scope markers and the _llvmlite_self_ref shim module does not exist; its absence confirms the control predates the metadata change. Must list the same models as its paired feature arm so the dashboard compares them on an identical set.
